title: rikliella chinensis
intro: Rikliella chinensis, also known as the Chinese rikliella or Chinese bitter tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rikliella chinensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Rikliella chinensis is often prepared as an herbal tea, and its leaves can also be dried and used in infusions or decoctions for its medicinal properties.
